_meta.purpose: Per-address neighborhood + district snapshot. Lookups by H3 res-8 index.
_meta.normalization: norm = raw / shared_denominator * 100 (car max as denom; transit on same scale to preserve the modal gap)
_meta.percentile: share of same-group units below (ties at midpoint), computed on raw scores; -1 = n/a
_meta.null_transit_districts: Sherman, Union had no transit value; set to 0 (no transit access)
_meta.district_typology: modal town class among the district's hexes

gap_labels.1: Access depends entirely on a car
gap_labels.6: Really low access by any mode
